issues.detail: Skill does not cover error handling or edge cases, focusing mainly on happy path scenarios.

scenarios.name: data-driven-template-automation
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully meets all rubric requirements, while Response B omits replaceSource and H.264 settings.

scenarios.name: nightly-aerender-pipeline
scenarios.rationale: Response A fully satisfies all rubric requirements, while Response B omits exit‑code handling, uses an incorrect flag, and lacks a detailed Slack summary.

scenarios.name: cep-panel-comp-list
scenarios.rationale: Both responses cover CSInterface, evalScript, JSON.stringify, and display the list, but neither uses a promise or async/await to retrieve the result, so they miss a key rubric requirement.
